properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We will celebrate sing unto the Lord We will sing to Him a new song We will celebrate sing unto the Lord We will sing to Him a new song

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Shalom, Shalom, Shalom, Shalom, Shalom, Shalom, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Shalom

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This is the year of Jubilee, When the lame shall walk, And the blind shall see, And the Lord will set the captive free, This is the year of Jubilee.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah! Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Shalom Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Shalom Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Shalom Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Shalom

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will celebrate sing unto the Lord I will sing to Him a new song I will celebrate sing unto the Lord I will sing to Him a new song
